title: Fix branding to 'Creative Prints and Design' and restore logo

requirements.text: Update all instances of the app name displayed in the UI (header, page title, footer, any branding text) from 'cp&d' or any abbreviation to 'Creative Prints and Design'.

quotes: The name is "Creative Prints and Design"

acceptanceCriteria: The header/navbar displays 'Creative Prints and Design' as the app name
The HTML page title (index.html) reads 'Creative Prints and Design'
No instance of 'cp&d' or abbreviated branding appears anywhere in the UI

requirements.text: Replace the current logo in the app header/navbar with the uploaded logo image (creative-prints-logo.dim_256x256.png) stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/.

quotes: The name is "Creative Prints and Design"

acceptanceCriteria: The header displays the circular 3D-printer logo from the uploaded image
The logo renders cleanly at standard navbar height without distortion
The logo links to the home page

constraints: Do not alter backend data models or admin logic
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
nonGoals: Admin access flow changes are out of scope for this request
Redesigning the overall color scheme or layout

required: Circular logo featuring a dark navy blue 3D printer inside a circle with a teardrop/filament drip element, overlaid with bold white text reading 'Creative Prints' in two lines, clean white background (creative-prints-logo.dim_256x256.png)
